member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken
member.summary: Represents an OAuth access token with expiration details.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Represents an OAuth access token with expiration details.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken.IsExpired
member.summary: Check if token has expired.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken.IsExpiringSoon
member.summary: Check if token is expiring soon (within 5 minutes).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState
member.summary: Represents the authentication state of an account (AU-05).

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState.Authenticated
member.summary: Account has valid tokens; syncs can proceed.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState.AuthRequired
member.summary: Token refresh failed; user must re-authenticate via browser.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AuthStateService
member.summary: Observable auth state service (AU-05). Publishes account auth state transitions for UI subscribers.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ConsentStore
member.summary: In-memory consent store for tokens (AU-02, AU-03). Desktop app will override with database-backed implementation.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IAuthStateService
member.summary: Publishes auth state transitions for UI subscribers (AU-05). Observables fire from background threads; subscribers must use ObserveOn(RxApp.MainThreadScheduler).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IAuthStateService.AccountAuthStateChanged
member.summary: Observable fired whenever an account's auth state changes (e.g. token refresh fails). Fires from the token-refresh background thread; subscribers must marshal to UI thread.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IAuthStateService.PublishAuthStateChange(System.Guid,AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccountAuthState)
member.summary: Publish an auth state transition.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IConsentStore
member.summary: Records and retrieves per-account consent decisions for insecure token fallback storage (AU-02, AU-03, NF-06).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IConsentStore.GetConsentDecisionAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if user has already made a consent decision for this account.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IConsentStore.SetConsentDecisionAsync(System.Guid,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Record user's consent decision (allow or deny insecure fallback token storage).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IMsalClient
member.summary: Abstraction over MSAL (Microsoft Authentication Library) for OAuth flows (AU-01). All implementations must use ConfigureAwait(false) on all await calls.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IMsalClient.AcquireTokenInteractiveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquire an access token via the system browser interactive flow (AU-01). Scopes requested: Files.ReadWrite, offline_access. Must not be called on the Avalonia UI thread — dispatch via Task.Run.
member.returns: Access token and refresh token (if offline_access granted).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.IMsalClient.AcquireTokenSilentAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempt silent token refresh using cached tokens (AU-04). Never throws on failure — returns with failure instead.
member.returns: Success if refresh succeeded; Failure if user auth required or network error.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager
member.summary: Manages OAuth token lifecycle: acquisition, refresh, persistence, and failure handling (AU-02, AU-04, AU-05, NF-06). Scoped per account — each account has its own token state machine. All methods return Result<T, string> or Option<T> (NF-16).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.AccountId
member.summary: Account ID this token manager is bound to.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.GetTokenSilentlyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a valid access token, attempting silent refresh if needed (AU-04). Returns Failure if refresh fails or user must re-authenticate.
member.remarks: On failure, the auth state transitions to AuthRequired and is published.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.PersistTokenAsync(AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.AccessToken,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persist a newly-acquired access token (e.g. after interactive auth flow).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.ITokenManager.ClearTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clear all stored tokens for this account (e.g. on logout).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.MsalClient
member.summary: MSAL client implementation (AU-01). Handles system browser OAuth flow for consumers tenant only.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.OneDrive.Client.Features.Authentication.TokenManager
member.summary: Token manager implementation (AU-02, AU-04, AU-05). Scoped per account. Handles silent refresh and token persistence.
